level.setting: The Desecrated Laboratory of a Mad Transmuter

pickup.name: Concentrated Sulfur Extract
pickup.effect: Adds explosive splash damage to the next 3 shots

encounters.trigger: Opening the reinforced door using a key found inside the Homunculus carcass

pickup.name: Purified Quicksilver
pickup.effect: Coats the weapon to bypass supernatural armor

encounters.trigger: A pressure plate under the Observer's pedestal unlocks the elevator to the sub-basement

pickup.name: Essence of Vitriol
pickup.effect: A highly corrosive acid capable of dissolving divine seals

encounters.trigger: The Amalgam's death scream shatters the glass seal leading to the Boss Sanctum

boss.name: The Failed Arch-Alchemist
boss.weakness: Essence of Vitriol applied to his life-support phylactery
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the phylactery using the Essence of Vitriol then shatter the Arch-Alchemist with the Vial Launcher

level.objective: Retrieve the Philosopher's Stone from the heart of the corrupted laboratory.
level.reward: Unlock the 'Master of Transmutation' skill tree and the 'Ever-Burning Lantern' artifact.

pickup.name: Vial of Liquefied Sulfur
pickup.effect: Enhances combustion intensity

encounters.trigger: Opening the iron portcullis triggers the awakening of the Bone-Stitcher in the next room.

pickup.name: Consecrated Oil Flask
pickup.effect: Increases weapon range and leaves a burning trail

encounters.trigger: The Stitcher's death rattle echoes through the vents, summoning the Scalded Sentinel.

pickup.name: Relic of the Sunless King
pickup.effect: Drains heat from the environment to empower a final strike

encounters.trigger: Placing the Relic on the altar opens the gateway to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Ignis the Forsaken Avatar
boss.weakness: Relic of the Sunless King freezing blast
boss.victory_condition: Absorb the Avatar's core while it is frozen by the Relic

level.objective: Purge the ancient ossuary of its corrupted guardians and claim the Sunless King's power.
level.reward: The Eternal Flame Core and Unlocked Nightmare Difficulty

pickup.name: Vial of Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: Adds holy burn damage to the next 3 attacks

encounters.trigger: Unlocking the iron gate triggers the bell in the next room

pickup.name: Obsidian Mirror
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible entities and reflects light

encounters.trigger: A scream from the rafters echoes toward the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Silver Essence
pickup.effect: Coats the blade to pierce ethereal armor

encounters.trigger: The high altar slides back to reveal the boss chamber

boss.name: High Priest Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Shatter Malakor's phylactery after depleting his health

level.objective: Exorcise the corrupted Cathedral and reclaim the lost soul fragments.

level.setting: An abandoned, frozen research outpost on a dying moon.

enemy.name: Frost-Bitten Shambler
enemy.weakness: Long-Range Pulse Rifle shots to the central ocular core

pickup.name: Thermal Flare
pickup.effect: Melts ice barriers and illuminates dark corridors

encounters.trigger: Opening the blast door with the Thermal Flare reveals the path to the Oxygen Garden.

enemy.name: Shadow-Stalker Vine
enemy.weakness: Thermal Flare ignited nearby to burn its roots

encounters.hazard: Toxic spores that reduce visibility and drain health

pickup.name: Cryo-Charged Battery
pickup.effect: Enhances energy weapon output for a single high-damage discharge

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Cryo-Charged Battery into the lift console unlocks the route to the Observatory.

enemy.name: Void-Warped Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Long-Range Pulse Rifle charged with the Cryo-Charged Battery

encounters.hazard: Cracked pressurized glass causing intermittent gravity shifts

pickup.name: Focusing Lens
pickup.effect: Condenses energy beams into a singular point of high-intensity heat

encounters.trigger: Aligning the telescope with the Focusing Lens signals the arrival of the Entity.

boss.name: The Star-Eater Apparition
boss.weakness: Focused beams of the Pulse Rifle directed through the Focusing Lens
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the four rift anchors while the boss is stunned by the Focusing Lens beam

level.objective: Exterminate the cosmic parasite and reclaim the outpost's signal beacon.
level.reward: The Ancient Astrarium artifact and a permanent range upgrade.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Ash
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the scepter to harm spectral entities

encounters.trigger: A heavy stone door slides open as the shadow dissipates, revealing the ossuary path.

pickup.name: Soul Binding Chain
pickup.effect: Reduces the movement speed of ethereal enemies

encounters.trigger: The specter's scream echoes through the vents, unlocking the gate to the Inner Sanctum.

pickup.name: Essence of the Damned
pickup.effect: Infuses the player with dark energy required to disrupt the boss's shield

encounters.trigger: The armor collapses into a pile of junk, and the floor lowers into the depths of the Boss Pit.

boss.name: Malakor the Unliving
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of the Damned to shatter Malakor's necro-shield and strike his heart.

level.objective: Exterminate the source of the rot within the crypt and reclaim the Necrotic Eye.
level.reward: The Necrotic Eye artifact and 500 dark favors.

level.setting: An abandoned industrial slaughterhouse dripping with viscera and flickering emergency lights

enemy.name: The Flayed Butcher
enemy.weakness: Serrated edges of the Jagged Bone-Saw Cleaver

pickup.name: Industrial Adrenaline Syringe
pickup.effect: Temporarily doubles attack speed and numbs pain

encounters.trigger: The Butcher falls through a floor grate, opening a path to the Rendering Vat

enemy.name: Adipose Mass
enemy.weakness: Metabolic shock from the Industrial Adrenaline Syringe

pickup.name: Canister of Concentrated Lye
pickup.effect: Corrosive chemical agent that dissolves organic matter

encounters.trigger: A steam pipe bursts, melting the locked door to the Waste Incinerator

enemy.name: The Calcified Stalker
enemy.weakness: Chemical erosion from the Canister of Concentrated Lye

pickup.name: High-Voltage Defibrillator Paddle
pickup.effect: Delivers a massive electrical surge to restart or stop a heart

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death scream activates the heavy blast doors to the Deep Pit

boss.name: The Aborted Amalgamation
boss.weakness: Direct electrical discharge from the High-Voltage Defibrillator Paddle
boss.victory_condition: Electrocute the core heart while the boss is submerged in cooling fluid

level.objective: Navigate the gore-slicked facility to purge the failed biological experiments
level.reward: Berserker's Bloodlust Rune: Permanently increases damage as health decreases

level.theme: Silent Arbiter of the Glass Grove
level.setting: An abandoned botanical conservatory bathed in perpetual moonlight and falling cherry blossoms.

encounters.hazard: Deep water pits hidden under lily pads

pickup.name: Sunlight Resin
pickup.effect: Adds holy light to the next three weapon strikes

encounters.trigger: A heavy iron gate leading to the Arboretum creaks open as the Mourner dissipates.

encounters.hazard: Tripline vines that release sedative pollen

pickup.name: Vial of Quicksilver
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants invulnerability to physical projectiles

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's collapse causes a massive stone statue to rotate, revealing a hidden spiral staircase.

pickup.name: Moonlight Catalyst
pickup.effect: A radiant stone that amplifies the Censer's aura to pure white heat

encounters.trigger: The Automaton falls through the floor, creating a breach into the Sanctum of the Root.

boss.name: The Great Weeping Willow
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the central heart-wood using the amplified Censer aura.

level.objective: Purify the corruption within the conservatory to restore the silence of the grove.
level.reward: The 'Warden's Grace' armor set and the title 'Herald of Peace'.

level.setting: An abandoned, neon-soaked carnival inside a giant jack-in-the-box

pickup.name: Bag of Silver Glitter
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: The exit door opens only when the Mime is defeated, leading to the Carousel of Sighs.

pickup.name: Vial of Eternal Bubbles
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary shield

encounters.trigger: The pony's head falls off and rolls toward the Big Top Tent, acting as a key to the entrance.

pickup.name: Squeaky Rubber Mallet
pickup.effect: Stuns mechanical entities

encounters.trigger: The clown nose sneezes, blowing open the curtains to the Boss arena.

boss.name: Chuckles the Clockwork Ringmaster
boss.victory_condition: Trap the Ringmaster inside a giant bubble and pop it with the wand.

level.objective: Navigate the haunted carnival to retrieve the stolen Heart of Laughter.
level.reward: The Mask of Joy and 500 Experience Points.

enemy.name: Rust-Eaten Automaton
enemy.weakness: Pressure-Vented Rivet Gun to the exposed neck joint

encounters.hazard: Erratic steam bursts from ruptured pipes

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Enhances electrical conductivity of projectiles

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton releases a surge that unlocks the door to the Capacitor Chamber

enemy.name: Leaking Tesla Drone
enemy.weakness: Conductive Copper Wire used as a grounding tether

pickup.name: Corrosive Solvent Flask
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced brass plating on impact

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion shatters the observation glass leading to the Scrap Compactor

enemy.name: Heavy Brass Guardian
enemy.weakness: Corrosive Solvent Flask to melt its shield

encounters.hazard: Descending ceiling plates every sixty seconds

pickup.name: Overclocking Gearset
pickup.effect: Doubles the firing rate of the Rivet Gun

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian activates the main elevator rising to the Boss Platform

boss.name: The Great Chronos Crank
boss.weakness: Overclocking Gearset applied to the central core's cooling fan
boss.victory_condition: Overheat the core by jamming the gears and firing rivets into the internal vents

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing foundry to disable the malfunctioning central engine.
level.reward: The 'Master Mechanic' badge and a permanent upgrade to the Rivet Gun's magazine size.

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Reduces electrical damage received

encounters.trigger: Opening the valve reveals the hidden lift to the Dynamo Room

pickup.name: Vial of Corrosive Solvent
pickup.effect: Melts reinforced brass plating

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Dynamo unlocks the Heavy Vault door

pickup.name: Overdrive Gear-Key
pickup.effect: Temporarily increases weapon output

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Key into the central pedestal summons the Core Overseer

boss.name: Grand Overseer Malphas
boss.victory_condition: Overload the central furnace while boosted by the Gear-Key

level.objective: Infiltrate the Great Clock and retrieve the Infinite Spring
level.reward: Legendary Artificer Schematic: Master of Time Title

level.setting: The Floating Clockwork Aviary of Professor Pumpernickel

pickup.name: Sticky Honey-Oil
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Unlocks the elevator to the Wind-Up Gardens

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Dust
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of surfaces

encounters.trigger: Lowers the drawbridge to the Pendulum Plaza

pickup.name: Super-Slippery Solvent
pickup.effect: Completely removes friction from metal plates

encounters.trigger: Opens the grand gilded doors to the Professor's Lab

boss.name: The Great Cuckoo Behemoth
boss.victory_condition: Apply solvent to the central gear to make the boss slide off its perch

level.setting: The Rust-Choked Ironworks of New Aetheria

enemy.name: Clockwork Sentry
enemy.weakness: Serrated Steam-Dagger blade applied to neck joints

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Can be used to bypass electrical security gates

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Sentry sounds a silent alarm that unlocks the Boiler Access Corridor.

enemy.name: The Grinder Drone
enemy.weakness: Insulated Copper Wire jammed into the cooling fan

pickup.name: Flask of Liquid Nitrogen
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes moving metal components

encounters.trigger: Killing the Drone causes the elevator to descend, leading to the Boss Vault.

enemy.name: Steam-Hiss Prowler
enemy.weakness: Flask of Liquid Nitrogen thrown at the main exhaust port

pickup.name: Magnetic Pulse Charge
pickup.effect: Disables heavy magnetic shielding for a short duration

encounters.trigger: The Prowler's death rattle overrides the security lockout on the Master Forge door.

boss.name: Grand Architect Malphas in Juggernaut Suit
boss.weakness: Magnetic Pulse Charge used on the suit's core stabilization matrix
boss.victory_condition: Defeat Malphas before the Forge reaches critical meltdown in 10 turns.

level.objective: Infiltrate the high-security forge and assassinate the rogue architect to stop the production of the steam-powered army.
level.reward: The Architect's Master Key and the 'Shadow of the Gears' Stealth Augmentation.

level.setting: The Abyssal Gearworks, a subterranean brass factory shrouded in perpetual smog and flickering gaslight.

encounters.hazard: Scalding steam bursts from floor grates

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Doubles the range of electrical discharges

encounters.trigger: A pressure valve ruptures, unlocking the heavy bulkhead door to the Foundry.

pickup.name: Magnetic Resonator
pickup.effect: Briefly disrupts clockwork mechanisms

encounters.trigger: The stalker falls into a gear shaft, jamming the machinery and exposing the elevator to the core.

encounters.hazard: Oscillating tesla coils on the ceiling

pickup.name: Static Capacitor
pickup.effect: Stores kinetic energy to release a massive EMP blast

encounters.trigger: The Overseer's destruction triggers a facility-wide alarm, drawing the Great Iron Architect from its hangar.

boss.name: The Great Iron Architect
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Static Capacitor within the boss's central furnace core.

level.objective: Navigate through the smog-choked factory to dismantle the rogue AI controlling the city's power grid.
level.reward: The 'Stormbringer' Title and a permanent upgrade to Lightning Bolt damage.

level.setting: The Rust-Choked Iron Spires of New Chronos

pickup.name: Brass Chrono-Key
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal flux

encounters.trigger: Opening the heavy iron gate with the Chrono-Key reveals the Engine Room.

pickup.name: Vial of Overclocked Oil
pickup.effect: Grants a brief speed boost

encounters.trigger: The Scavenger's death cry activates the elevator to the Observatory.

pickup.name: Magnetized Gear Core
pickup.effect: Disrupts localized gravity

encounters.trigger: The Observatory floor collapses, dropping the player into the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: The Grand Architect Golem
boss.victory_condition: Place the Magnetized Gear Core into the Golem's chest plate to freeze its internal movements.

level.objective: Infiltrate the desolate iron spires to stop the malfunctioning Grand Architect.
level.reward: The Chronos Heart, an artifact capable of rewinding time by ten seconds.

pickup.name: Magnetic Sludge
pickup.effect: Reduces movement speed of metallic entities

encounters.trigger: A pressure gauge explodes, opening the ventilation shaft to the Ore Smelter.

pickup.name: Vibrating Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Amplifies seismic resonance by 300 percent

encounters.trigger: The serpent's death rattle collapses the floor into the Clockwork Sanctum.

pickup.name: Void-Infused Lubricant
pickup.effect: Dissolves supernatural friction in ancient gears

encounters.trigger: The horror's explosion jams the main drive-shaft, forcing the Great Engine Core to emerge.

boss.name: Arch-Artificer Malphas (Manifested Core)
boss.victory_condition: Apply lubricant to the core and deliver a final tectonic strike.

level.objective: Descent into the mechanical underworld to silence the screaming engine of Ouroboros.

level.setting: The Gilded Arboretum, a floating glass conservatory filled with brass clockwork plants and soft golden mist.

encounters.hazard: Leaking steam pipes with low pressure

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Enhances weapon with electrical properties for the next encounter

encounters.trigger: Opening the pressure valve unlocks the door to the Reflection Pool.

pickup.name: Solar Lens Fragment
pickup.effect: Focuses light into a concentrated beam

encounters.trigger: Placing the heron's core into the pedestal reveals the path to the Solar Spire.

encounters.hazard: Slowly rotating fan blades in the floor

pickup.name: Overcharged Capacitor
pickup.effect: Can be thrown to overload heavy machinery

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel lowers the bridge to the Grand Clockwork Observatory.

boss.name: The Great Orrey Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Throw the Overcharged Capacitor into the Guardian's main gear housing to disable its shields.

level.objective: Purify the corrupt heart of the Gilded Arboretum to restore peace to the floating islands.
